entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in Xince and Xodel successful, version 1.0. - xodel

[xule:error] rule labels: Rule has run too many iterations, either remove catesian products in the rule or the instance or increase the iterations using --xule-max-rule-iterations option. - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1050140/000092963824003162/form6k.htm
